metadata.description: .NET auto-update skill suite — 7 skills for GeneralUpdate: scaffolding, UI, strategy, advanced, troubleshooting (50+ issues), migration, and security audit

plugins.name: generalupdate-skill
plugins.description: Complete GeneralUpdate (.NET auto-update) integration skill suite. Generates dual-project scaffolding, full-state update UI (6 frameworks), 6 update strategies decision tree (Client-Server/OSS/Silent/Differential/CVP/Push), advanced extension points (Bowl crash daemon, IPC replacement, AOT), BM25-powered troubleshooting search (50+ known issues), v9.x→v10 migration guide, and 14-point security audit matrix. All templates target NuGet v10.5.0-beta.6.
